programs.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop 2
programs.desc: After six years of keeping our malls safe, Paul Blart (Kevin James) has earned a vacation. He heads to Vegas with his teenage daughter and finds that safety never takes a holiday. When duty calls, Blart answers.

programs.title: White Chicks
programs.desc: Two disgraced FBI agents go way undercover in an effort to protect hotel heiresses the Wilton Sisters from a kidnapping plot.

programs.title: Gigli
programs.desc: When small time street thug Larry Gigli meets a tough and gorgeous enforcer named Ricki, the sparks fly in this outrageous battle of the sexes.

programs.title: Joe Dirt (2001)
programs.desc: Jeers turn to cheers when a hard luck but plunky itinerant janitor becomes an unlikely hero.

programs.title: Joe Dirt 2: Beautiful Loser
programs.desc: The mullet-topped underdog of America is back. Get ready to paint the country red, white and trash.
